Sch.ad loc.), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg008:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.48</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
